summary: Implemented the Zebes Route stage object setup function grZebesRoute_8020B260, added its StageCallbacks data table, and corrected the public prototype to return HSD_GObj*, improving that function from 0.00% to 99.97% in the decomp.dev report.

key_files.reason: Added grZe_Route_803E5DB0 StageCallbacks table, required includes, and the implementation of grZebesRoute_8020B260.
Changed grZebesRoute_8020B260 prototype from void to HSD_GObj* to match the implemented return value.

what_changed: Added includes for gr/grdisplay.h, baselib/gobjgxlink.h, and baselib/gobjproc.h so the new implementation can call grDisplay_801C5DB0, GObj_SetupGXLink, and HSD_GObjProc_8038FD54 directly.
Defined StageCallbacks grZe_Route_803E5DB0 with three callback entries and a NULL sentinel; the second entry uses flags 0xC0000000.

Implemented grZebesRoute_8020B260(int gobj_id) by indexing grZe_Route_803E5DB0 by gobj_id, creating/fetching a ground gobj with Ground_801C14D0, configuring Ground callback fields, setting the GX link, invoking callback0, and registering callback2 as a gobj proc when present.
Added the failure path OSReport("%s:%d: couldn t get gobj(id=%d)\n", __FILE__, 197, gobj_id) when Ground_801C14D0 returns NULL.
Changed the header declaration of grZebesRoute_8020B260 from void grZebesRoute_8020B260(int) to HSD_GObj* grZebesRoute_8020B260(int).
Removed unmatched-function markers for grZebesRoute_8020B1F4 and grZebesRoute_8020B260 in the diff context.
smart_moves: Reconstructed the StageCallbacks table before implementing the function, which let the code use the same callback-indexing pattern as other stage object setup routines.
Returned the created HSD_GObj* and updated the header signature, avoiding a mismatch between implementation behavior and declarations.
Preserved conditional callback behavior: callback3 is assigned to Ground::x1C_callback, callback0 is invoked immediately, and callback2 is registered through HSD_GObjProc_8038FD54 only when non-NULL.
Matched the error-reporting path with the exact OSReport string, __FILE__, and hardcoded source line number used in the diff.
Used specific headers for display, GX link, and gobj proc dependencies instead of leaving the implementation dependent on placeholders or incidental declarations.
decomp_lessons: For stage ground-object constructors, look for a StageCallbacks array indexed by gobj_id; matching the .data table can be as important as matching the function body.
A common stage setup pattern is Ground_801C14D0(gobj_id), clear Ground x8/xC callbacks, attach grDisplay_801C5DB0 with GObj_SetupGXLink, then wire stage callbacks into Ground fields or gobj procs.
Do not ignore return types on previously stubbed stage functions; this PR shows a void prototype was wrong once the function body returned the created HSD_GObj*.
OSReport failure strings and line-number literals are part of the matching surface and should be reproduced exactly when evidence supports them.
The callback table’s unused callback1 field can still be present in data even when this constructor only reads callback0, callback2, and callback3.
naming_conventions: Kept stage functions under the grZebesRoute_8020Bxxx address-based naming pattern.
Named the reconstructed callback table grZe_Route_803E5DB0, using the stage-specific grZe_Route prefix and the data address suffix.
Used descriptive local names gobj_id and callbacks while retaining common decomp local shorthand gp for Ground*.
Header declarations retain address comments such as /* 20B260 */ beside each grZebesRoute symbol.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Use a direct StageCallbacks* callbacks = &grZe_Route_803E5DB0[gobj_id] expression before the Ground_801C14D0 call to reflect the observed control/data flow.
Model the StageCallbacks initializer with explicit NULL sentinel and exact flag constants, including 0xC0000000 for the second route entry.
Keep callback null checks separate and in order: callback3 assignment, callback0 invocation, then callback2 proc registration.
Use GObj_SetupGXLink(gobj, grDisplay_801C5DB0, 3, 0) and HSD_GObjProc_8038FD54(gobj, callbacks->callback2, 4) with the exact small integer arguments from the diff.
Match the failure branch with OSReport and return gobj at the end rather than early-returning in each branch.
review_feedback: No human review comments or formal reviews were present in the provided slice.
decomp-dev bot reported GALE01 matched code at 57.52%, a +0.14% and +5580 byte improvement.
decomp-dev bot reported main/melee/gr/grzebesroute grZebesRoute_8020B260 improved by +231 bytes from 0.00% to 99.97%.
decomp-dev bot reported main/melee/gr/grzebesroute .data improved by +82 bytes from 0.00% to 41.24%.
follow_up_queries: Find other stage object setup functions that call Ground_801C14D0 and wire StageCallbacks into Ground callback fields.
Search for StageCallbacks tables with NULL sentinels and 0xC0000000 flags in other gr modules.
Compare grZebesRoute_8020B260 against analogous gr* constructors that call GObj_SetupGXLink and HSD_GObjProc_8038FD54.
Investigate why decomp.dev still reported grZebesRoute_8020B260 at 99.97% rather than 100.00% after this PR.
